positive: A stunning, highly detailed, symmetrical celestial map featuring stylized fauna and cosmic geometry. The central motif is a mythical constellation intertwined with bioluminescent jungle foliage and abstract, ornate geometric patterns, reminiscent of Art Nouveau and Neo-Tribal art. The color palette should feature deep indigo blues, vibrant cosmic purples, brilliant metallic gold, and emerald accents. Use strong contrast to define clean, thick silhouettes suitable for screen printing on textiles. Composition must be circular and centered, with radial symmetry, achieving a sophisticated, luxurious, and mystical aesthetic. Graphic novel quality, vector illustration style, detailed line work, studio lighting.
negative: low resolution, blurry, washed out, poor composition, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, noise, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, amateur, dirty, illegible
